title: wolftpm-tss: setenv failure returns Error::Transport{code:-1} instead of meaningful error
description: In wolftpm-tss/src/connection.rs WolfTpmSwtpm::connect, when libc::setenv fails (returns -1, indicating ENOMEM or similar), the code returns Err(Error::Transport { code: -1 }). Error::Transport is intended for wolfTPM/TPM_RC codes. A display of 'wolfTPM transport error 0xffffffff' is misleading — this is a system-level failure setting an env var, not a TPM protocol error. The wolftpm crate handles this better by returning Error::InvalidArg with a descriptive message. Fix: either map to Error::InvalidArg or add an Error::SystemError variant.
